seo.title: Interior Designer in California | Kitchens, Bathrooms & Remodels | Alexandra Diz
seo.description: Alexandra Diz designs refined California homes: kitchen remodels, bathroom remodels, ADUs, and full house interiors with real finished project photography.
seo.keywords: California interior designer, kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, ADU interiors, Alexandra Diz

collage.title: Kitchens made to be used.
collage.text: Different kitchen projects, real finished photos: storage, light, work surfaces, and the line where daily life happens.
collage.quote: Real kitchens should look calm and work hard.
collage.cardText: No render mood here: just finished kitchens, natural light, and materials already doing their job.

feature.quote: "Homes become beautiful when every practical decision has a visual reason."
feature.darkText: Plans, millwork and finishes are edited until the home feels composed, useful and personal.
feature.lightText: From a single room consultation to full remodel planning, the work stays focused on clarity.

items.title: Natural light
